title: Who is Nishanth Manoharan?
content: Nishanth Manoharan is a Data Analytics Engineering graduate student at Northeastern University and a recruiter-facing candidate with experience across generative AI, retrieval-augmented generation, data engineering, analytics, machine learning, and dashboarding.

title: Current Location
content: Nishanth's resumes list his current location as Boston, Massachusetts.

title: Core Focus Areas
content: His core focus areas include RAG systems, LLM evaluation, data pipelines, analytics engineering, recruiter-friendly AI assistants, forecasting, NLP, and business intelligence workflows.

title: Certifications
content: Certifications listed across the resume set include AWS Certified AI Practitioner and Databricks Certified Data Engineer Associate. One resume variant also notes a Generative AI Associate certification in progress.
